text: I feel a tinge of curiosity mingled with a quiet awe. The glass wall creates a subtle barrier, inviting me to contemplate the line between observer and participant. Inside, the exhibit pulses with possibility—an exploration of the interplay between human ingenuity and intelligent machines. Surrounded by screens, text, and creative displays, I sense the promise and ambiguity of progress. This is a space for questions, for reflection, for encountering the edge of the known.
